priority_rationale: Highest overlap risk because DS062 is also ACT1-labeled infliximab UC; DS106 has 48 patients/113 longitudinal biopsy arrays and could supersede or overlap DS062.
source_evidence_needed: GEO series design and sample characteristics; PubMed 21448149; GSM-level patient/timepoint/treatment labels; confirm whether DS062 samples are reused, precursor data, or distinct ACT1 subset.

priority_rationale: Must be verified together with DS106; current metadata has missing PMID/DOI/year and prior source check suggests same Gut 2009 family as DS063.
source_evidence_needed: GEO GSE12251 title/design/sample table; PMID/DOI from linked publication; ACT1 trial documentation; GSM sample IDs compared against DS106.

priority_rationale: Same Gut 2009 publication family as DS062 but likely separate Leuven cohort; needs verification to avoid forcing ACT1 or overcounting with ACT1 rows.
source_evidence_needed: GEO GSE14580 source/cohort description; PubMed 19700435 / DOI 10.1136/gut.2009.178665; GSM sample labels; confirm cohort A/B relationship to DS062.

priority_rationale: Mixed VDZ trial plus IFX comparator row; important because IFX comparator may conceptually or actually overlap with DS061/DS062/DS106-style IFX rows.
source_evidence_needed: GEO design and series matrix; PubMed 27802155; trial names for VDZ samples; GSM labels for IFX comparator; source-level check against DS061 and ACT1 rows.

priority_rationale: Likely UNITI/IM-UNITI family and may overlap conceptually with DS107; large sample count makes miscounting visible.
source_evidence_needed: GEO GSE112366 design/sample labels; PMID 29782846; confirm UNITI-2 vs IM-UNITI components; compare tissue/timepoint/patient identifiers against DS107.

priority_rationale: Explicit UNITI-2 phase 3 baseline rectal biopsy row; should be verified with DS047 before assigning a shared UNITI family.
source_evidence_needed: GEO GSE207022 and series matrix; PMID 36170836; trial/treatment/timepoint metadata; confirm whether subjects overlap DS047 or are a separate organoid-paper reuse.

priority_rationale: Very large sample count and likely CERTIFI phase 2b ustekinumab Crohn family; candidate label is medium confidence and needs trial-name confirmation.
source_evidence_needed: GEO GSE100833 design; PubMed 28892060 / DOI 10.1038/ng.3947; trial identifier or CERTIFI mention; sample/timepoint structure; distinguish baseline blood vs biopsy rows.

priority_rationale: High-confidence trial name but sample counts and DOI are incomplete; lower overlap risk because no other UNIFI rows are currently flagged.
source_evidence_needed: GEO GSE206285 design/sample table; PMID 36192482; DOI; confirm UNIFI trial phase/component and baseline sigmoid biopsy sample counts.

priority_rationale: High-confidence EUCALYPTUS label with good PMID/DOI and sample count; lower immediate overlap risk, though it should remain separate from BERGAMOT and other anti-integrin rows.
source_evidence_needed: GEO GSE72819 design/sample characteristics; PubMed 26522261 / DOI 10.1053/j.gastro.2015.10.041; confirm phase II EUCALYPTUS naming, baseline-only design, and one biopsy per patient.
